summary: A solid audience recording capturing an energetic performance with several standout moments.
review: Reviewers praise this audience-sourced tape for its good sound quality and the high energy delivered by the band. While specific songs aren’t called out, the recording is highlighted as a valuable addition to the Dead’s live catalog.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review enthusiastically endorses both the performance and recording, suggesting an excellent show and good audio despite limited detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the tape as a "good recording" with no noted flaws; it is part of the audience recordings collection.
